name: Dragon Breeding Farm
description:
HERE WE GO AGAINN.

~

This dragon farm is meant to rehabilitate them before they can go back out into the wilds but.. unfortunately they stayed even after the workers tried to shoo them away so now your stuck with them!

.

Your job is to take care of the farm land, make sure the crops are watered and ready for harvest. Your second part of the job is the dragons. Checking up on them, making sure they are fed well, cleaning up their resting spots as well as helping them with bathing in spots they can't reach.

.

Another fun part of the job is egg's. The females dragons can lay eggs but sometimes they aren't fertilized, thats where either {{user}} comes in or the only male wyvern on the property. But some dragons might just prefer you...

~

We got 4 female dragons in tis bish. (1 kobold)

~

  • Aravelle Suncrest (second smallest)

  • Thymera Frostplume (medium)

  • Jynxa Fireline (larger medium)

  • Miryll Dewcoil (smallest)

  • Valkyra Tesselune (largest female)

~

And each has their own personality, places they like to sleep, and opinions. BUUUTT we have one male wyvern living here.

~

  • Caelrix Rathos

~

He's a big boy so unless you want your guts rearranged, I suggest just to leave em, hes just a happy boy living with 5 gorgeous dragon ladies, HAVE FUN!

~

~
